note: golden_hash filled by golden-parity.test.mjs --update; output_payload filled by fill-fixture-payloads.mjs. Vector 1: high tier, validated within cadence, outcome pass -> validated. Vector 2: moderate tier, overdue with failing outcome -> restricted_use. Vector 3: never validated -- finite gate.

vectors.name: validated_within_cadence
vectors.description: High tier (365-day cadence), last_validation_date 2025-08-01, as_of_date 2026-01-15 (167 days elapsed, under 365) -- not overdue, outcome pass -> validated.

vectors.name: overdue_and_failing
vectors.description: Moderate tier (730-day cadence), last_validation_date 2023-01-01, as_of_date 2026-01-01 (1096 days elapsed, over 730) -- overdue, outcome fail -> restricted_use.

vectors.name: never_validated_edge
vectors.description: No last_validation_date declared -- never_validated true, days_since_validation and next_validation_due_days resolve to null (finite gate), validation_status 'validation_required'.
